## Meeting Purpose

[Debrief on recent sales activities and discuss improvements to the sales process.](https://fathom.video/share/3AGG3MeeNU5r6n1R-SAa4Mdb-XxQ7s3G?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Recent meeting with potential client went well; identified $300k conference spend as key leverage point](https://fathom.video/share/3AGG3MeeNU5r6n1R-SAa4Mdb-XxQ7s3G?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [No-show rates for lower-qualified meetings hover around 50%; team considering pre-meeting qualification improvements](https://fathom.video/share/3AGG3MeeNU5r6n1R-SAa4Mdb-XxQ7s3G?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Communication challenges with Marcel (likely CEO/leadership) causing some workflow bottlenecks](https://fathom.video/share/3AGG3MeeNU5r6n1R-SAa4Mdb-XxQ7s3G?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)

## Topics

### Recent Sales Meeting Success

  - [Team performed "really, really well" in a recent client meeting](https://fathom.video/share/3AGG3MeeNU5r6n1R-SAa4Mdb-XxQ7s3G?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [Identified CEO as potential blocker](https://fathom.video/share/3AGG3MeeNU5r6n1R-SAa4Mdb-XxQ7s3G?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
  - [Key insight: Client spends $300k on conferences; GrowthX can deliver 12 months of value for 1/3 of that cost](https://fathom.video/share/3AGG3MeeNU5r6n1R-SAa4Mdb-XxQ7s3G?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [Pushed for Statement of Work (SOW) to gauge serious interest](https://fathom.video/share/3AGG3MeeNU5r6n1R-SAa4Mdb-XxQ7s3G?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [Kyle and Bruno had good chemistry/combo in the meeting](https://fathom.video/share/3AGG3MeeNU5r6n1R-SAa4Mdb-XxQ7s3G?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)

### Improving Pre-Meeting Qualification

  - [Considering 5-question task for prospects to provide context before meetings](https://fathom.video/share/3AGG3MeeNU5r6n1R-SAa4Mdb-XxQ7s3G?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Potential options:](https://fathom.video/share/3AGG3MeeNU5r6n1R-SAa4Mdb-XxQ7s3G?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
      - [Multiple choice questions about reasons for pursuing organic growth](https://fathom.video/share/3AGG3MeeNU5r6n1R-SAa4Mdb-XxQ7s3G?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
      - [Request for LinkedIn profile](https://fathom.video/share/3AGG3MeeNU5r6n1R-SAa4Mdb-XxQ7s3G?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
      - [Voice note tool (with Bappy) for prospects to explain their motivations](https://fathom.video/share/3AGG3MeeNU5r6n1R-SAa4Mdb-XxQ7s3G?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [Goal: Gather key information without being overly burdensome to prospects](https://fathom.video/share/3AGG3MeeNU5r6n1R-SAa4Mdb-XxQ7s3G?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)

### No-Show Rates and Meeting Qualifications

  - [Lower-qualified meetings have \~50% no-show rate](https://fathom.video/share/3AGG3MeeNU5r6n1R-SAa4Mdb-XxQ7s3G?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Confirmed meetings slightly over 50% show rate](https://fathom.video/share/3AGG3MeeNU5r6n1R-SAa4Mdb-XxQ7s3G?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [When low-qualified prospects do show up, meetings can be "weird"](https://fathom.video/share/3AGG3MeeNU5r6n1R-SAa4Mdb-XxQ7s3G?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [Team aims to balance gathering info without annoying prospects pre-meeting](https://fathom.video/share/3AGG3MeeNU5r6n1R-SAa4Mdb-XxQ7s3G?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)

### Communication Challenges with Leadership

  - [Bruno having difficulty reaching Marcel (likely CEO) via WhatsApp](https://fathom.video/share/3AGG3MeeNU5r6n1R-SAa4Mdb-XxQ7s3G?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [2-3 day response times causing workflow issues](https://fathom.video/share/3AGG3MeeNU5r6n1R-SAa4Mdb-XxQ7s3G?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [Kyle acting as communication funnel to Marcel due to high volume of inquiries](https://fathom.video/share/3AGG3MeeNU5r6n1R-SAa4Mdb-XxQ7s3G?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Bruno compiling list of needed items from Marcel (e.g., custom workflow language)](https://fathom.video/share/3AGG3MeeNU5r6n1R-SAa4Mdb-XxQ7s3G?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)

### Pipeline and Deal Progress

  - [Diligent deal: Bruno made executive decision on pricing (18k for 2x editorial, can reduce to 9k for 1x if needed)](https://fathom.video/share/3AGG3MeeNU5r6n1R-SAa4Mdb-XxQ7s3G?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [Multiple promising logos entering the pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/3AGG3MeeNU5r6n1R-SAa4Mdb-XxQ7s3G?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
  - [Emphasis on maintaining deal momentum (next meeting → send SOW, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/3AGG3MeeNU5r6n1R-SAa4Mdb-XxQ7s3G?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement pre-meeting qualification improvements (5 questions, LinkedIn, or voice note)](https://fathom.video/share/3AGG3MeeNU5r6n1R-SAa4Mdb-XxQ7s3G?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Kyle to forward custom workflow language to Bruno from sales channel](https://fathom.video/share/3AGG3MeeNU5r6n1R-SAa4Mdb-XxQ7s3G?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Bruno to send compiled list of needed items from Marcel to Kyle](https://fathom.video/share/3AGG3MeeNU5r6n1R-SAa4Mdb-XxQ7s3G?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [Follow up on Diligent deal if no response to initial proposal](https://fathom.video/share/3AGG3MeeNU5r6n1R-SAa4Mdb-XxQ7s3G?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [Kyle to meet with Marcel at end of day to address outstanding items](https://fathom.video/share/3AGG3MeeNU5r6n1R-SAa4Mdb-XxQ7s3G?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
